title: coelopleurum multisectum var. trichocarpum
intro: Coelopleurum multisectum var. trichocarpum, also known as the Chinese angelica or Qīng Hāo in Chinese, is a plant species in the Apiaceae family, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its ability to treat a variety of health conditions. The health benefits of Coelopleurum multisectum var. trichocarpum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating conditions such as rheumatism and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations and supplements.
